nasb.text: (He was one who had been thrown into prison for an insurrection made in the city, and for murder.)

esv.text: a man who had been thrown into prison for an insurrection started in the city and for murder.

cnv.text: 這巴拉巴是因為在城裡作亂殺人而入獄的。

ccb.text: 巴拉巴是因在城里叛乱杀人而被下在监里的。

csbs.text: 这巴拉巴是因为在城里发生的一个暴乱和杀人案，被投进监狱的。
